verses.2: Hear, oh, hear the noise of his voice,
verses.3: He sends it out under the whole sky,
verses.5: God thunders marvelously with his voice.
verses.6: For he says to the snow, ‘Fall on the earth,’
verses.7: He seals up the hand of every man,
verses.9: Out of its room comes the storm,
verses.10: By the breath of God, ice is given,
verses.11: Yes, he loads the thick cloud with moisture.
verses.12: It is turned around by his guidance,
verses.13: whether it is for correction, or for his land,
verses.15: Do you know how God controls them,
verses.16: Do you know the workings of the clouds,
verses.18: Can you, with him, spread out the sky,
verses.19: Teach us what we will tell him,
verses.20: Will it be told him that I would speak?
verses.21: Now men don’t see the light which is bright in the skies,
verses.22: Out of the north comes golden splendor.
